supplements.name: Creatine Monohydrate
supplements.notes: Take with any meal. On rest days, take with lunch.

supplements.name: ALCAR
supplements.notes: Take with carbs (oatmeal, toast, banana). Don't take fasted.

supplements.name: L-Tyrosine
supplements.notes: Take on empty stomach or with carbs only. TL pre-workout has 600mg NALT on training days — this is on top.

supplements.name: Omega-3 Fish Oil
supplements.notes: Take with fattiest meal for absorption.

supplements.name: Vitamin D3 + K2
supplements.notes: Thorne liquid. Take with breakfast (fat-soluble). Target 40-60 ng/mL serum.

supplements.name: Magnesium Bisglycinate
supplements.notes: Thorne powder. Mix in water before bed. Supports sleep + recovery.

supplements.name: Zinc Picolinate
supplements.notes: Thorne. Take with dinner, away from magnesium (compete for absorption).

supplements.name: Copper Bisglycinate
supplements.notes: Thorne. Take with dinner alongside zinc. Offsets zinc-induced depletion.

supplements.name: Collagen + Vitamin C
supplements.notes: 30-60 min BEFORE training (Shaw protocol). On rest days, take with breakfast.

supplements.name: Casein Protein
supplements.notes: TL Grass-Fed. Before bed for overnight MPS. 30-40g threshold matters at 40.

supplements.name: Ashwagandha
supplements.notes: KSM-66 or Sensoril. Take with food. Watch for emotional blunting — start off-cycle early if noticed.

supplements.name: TL Stim-Free Pre-Workout
supplements.notes: 30 min pre-training. 8g citrulline, 4g beta-alanine, 600mg tyrosine. Tingles normal.

supplements.name: Cyclic Dextrin + Vital Aminos
supplements.notes: Mix in water. EAAs + sustained carb energy. Not a protein replacement.

supplements.name: Whey Isolate
supplements.notes: TL Grass-Fed. If shake IS post-workout meal, use 1.5 scoops.

supplements.name: BPC-157 (AM)
supplements.notes: InfiniWell. Finishing current supply then discontinuing — wait for legal injectable access.

supplements.name: BPC-157 (PM)
supplements.notes: InfiniWell. Finishing current supply then discontinuing — wait for legal injectable access.
